items.title: How Disaster Media Fails
items.author: Thomas Flight
items.content:
Support Hurricane Recovery in Asheville and WNC: https://thomasflight.com/helene 
(All ad revenue from this video will be donated to BeLoved Asheville.)

Get updates on the documentary and support my work on Patreon:
https://patreon.com/thomasflight

Some additional footage was provided by Getty Images.

items.title: The Best Cinematography I've Ever Seen
items.author: Thomas Flight
items.content:
Get your extended free trial of MUBI: https://mubi.com/thomasflight

A tour through the greatest cinematography I've ever seen in film, and why beauty is more than just stylistic choice. 

In Praise of Subtle Cinematography: https://nebula.tv/videos/thomasflight-in-praise-of-subtle-cinematography
